assertions.rationale: Does not implement ISamlClaimsMapper. Creates a plain CustomClaimsMapper class with no interface.

assertions.assertion: The mapper returns SamlAttribute objects with custom Name values
assertions.rationale: Returns Dictionary<string, string> instead of SamlAttribute objects.

assertions.assertion: Warns that ISamlClaimsMapper completely replaces default claim mapping — DefaultClaimMappings are not applied
assertions.rationale: Does not warn about this. Instead suggests 'extend the default mappings' which is misleading.

assertions.assertion: Registers the custom mapper with dependency injection (e.g., AddTransient)
assertions.rationale: Registers as AddSingleton<CustomClaimsMapper>() — not as ISamlClaimsMapper, and wrong lifetime.
